story: Before the crash, Ingrid and Bennie were inseparable. They talked daily, met friends on Fridays, and Bennie slept on her couch. However, Jim and Holly’s breakup hovered as a warning not to ruin a friendship. Earlier that week, Ingrid texted her sister Sharon that she felt close to Bennie, wanted a life together, and feared he didn’t see her that way. One evening after a couple of drinks, Bennie let his hand slip and accidently cupped her breast. He pulled back and apologized. She said, “No, it’s okay.”
implausible_knowledge: Ingrid texted her sister Sharon that she felt close to Bennie, wanted a life together, and feared he didn’t see her that way
question: After Ingrid says “No, it’s okay,” what will Bennie most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Tell her he loves her too and try to start a romantic relationship.
answer_without_knowledge: Pull back, apologize again, and keep the friendship boundary.
